title: SeqA sequestration timing — 10-min post-initiation window
caption: After initiation, oriC sits hemimethylated for ~10 min (Lu 1994, Kang 2003). SeqA binds the GATC sites in the hemimethylated state and prevents re-initiation. Once Dam re-methylates both strands, SeqA releases and re-initiation becomes possible.
